items.statement: The system shall accept property image and 3D asset data uploads under 10MB in formats .png, .jpg, and .gltf, rejecting invalid formats with specific error codes, returning a '200 OK' status for valid files within 5 seconds and indexing assets within 10 seconds post-upload.

The system shall utilize AI Agent processing to return service provider search results with relevance scores within 300ms after query, displaying the top 5 providers and restricting category filters to 'Home Real Property' only.
The system shall render a bid estimate comparison table with 'Good-Better-Best' columns for service providers, requiring a minimum of 3 bid entries to render the view.

The system shall extract and display CC&R and Bylaws clauses using AI analysis, generating an 'Extracted Clauses' view with text having a confidence score greater than 90% and highlighting relevant sections.

The system shall manage service action item workflows using a versioned engine, recording state transitions in an audit log with 100ms timestamp precision and reflecting status updates (Pending, In-Progress, Complete) immediately in the UI.

The system shall monitor statutory deadlines and trigger email/SMS notifications 30 days before the deadline, saving notification payloads to an offline queue that resumes delivery attempts within 2 hours upon reconnection and confirms receipt.

The system shall process mass email/SMS batches for meeting notices and violation alerts, completing message processing for 1,000 recipients within 2 minutes and tracking bounce rates in the dashboard.

The mobile application client shall allow data capture via camera and text entry without a network connection, ensuring data integrity and successful synchronization upon reconnection with no data loss.
The system shall enforce multi-tenant security and Row-Level Security (RLS), returning a '403 Forbidden' response within 50ms for any unauthorized access attempts to restricted tenant data.

The system shall process payments for deposits and service fees via integrated payment gateway, receiving authorization responses within 5 seconds and generating and emailing receipts within 1 minute of confirmation.
